sections.sectionTitle: Leitaw lam gam Kumpite a Kizawhna

verses.text: Joshua in Ai a lakna zia, leh Jerikho leh a kumpipa tungah a bawl bangin Ai leh a kumpipa tungah a bawlna, leh Gibeon khuasunga teng mite in Israel-te tawh kilemna a bawlna leh amaute lakah a omna thu Jerusalem kumpipa Adonizedek in a zak ciangin
nakpi takin a lau hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Gibeon pen kumpi khuate khat mah bangin khua lian khat hi a, Ai khua sangin zong lianzaw-in a mite khempeuh zong mi thahat ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem kumpipa Adonizedek in Hebron kumpipa Hoham kiang, Jarmuth kumpipa Piram kiang, Lakhish kumpipa Jafia kiang, leh Eglon kumpipa Debir kiangah kamtai sawlin
“Kei kiangah hong pai un. Hong huh un la, Gibeon vatgawp ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh Joshua leh Israel mite tawh kilemna na bawl khin uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Amor kumpi ngate, Jerusalem kumpi, Hebron kumpi, Jarmuth kumpi, Lakhish kumpi, leh Eglon kumpi, a galkapte khempeuh uh tawh paito-in Gibeon langkhatah phual satin a do uh hi

Tua ciangin Gibeon mite in Gilgal-a giahphuala Joshua kiangah kamtai sawlin, “Na nasemte hong nusia kei in. Manlang takin ko kiangah hong paito-in, kote hong hon in la, hong huh in. Bang hang hiam cih leh mualtung gama teng Amor kumpite khempeuh kote langpangin kikhawm uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Gilgal panin amah leh galhang mite khempeuh leh a thahat mi khempeuh tawh Joshua a kuanto hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Amaute na khutsungah hong pia khin ka hih manin amaute kihta kei in. Amaute khat beek in nang hong nang zolo ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Gilgal panin zan tawntung paito-in Joshua in thakhatthu-in amaute simgawp hi
Topa in Israel-te' mai-ah amaute amkham sakin, amaute in Gibeon-ah amaute tampi tak that uh a, Bethhoron paitohna lampi-ah amaute delhin, Azekah leh Makkedah ciangdong amaute a vatgawp uh hi

Israel-te' mai-ah amaute a tai laitak, Bethhoron paitohna-ah amaute a paisuk laitakun, Topa in vantung panin gialpi lianpite Azekah khua ciangdong, amaute' tungah lawnsuk a, amaute a si uh hi. Israel mite in namsau tawh a thah sangin tua gialpi hangin a si mi tamzaw hi
Tua ciangin, Topa in Israel mite tungah Amor mite a piak ni-in Joshua in Topa tungah thu gen a, amah in Israel mite' muhna-ah, “Ni aw, Gibeon-ah, Kha aw, Aijalon Kuam-ah khawlcip in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin hih minamte in a galte uh a zawh khit mateng ni dingcipin kha a khawl hi. * Hih thute, Jashar' Laibu sungah kigelh hi. Vankim lai-ah ni khawlin ni khat bup bang tumsuklo hi
Tua hun ma hita leh tua hun khit hita leh Topa in mi khat thu a ngaih tua ni bang nidang omlo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Israel mite-a' dingin a dosak hi
Tua ciangin Joshua, amah tawh a om Israel-te khempeuh tawh Gilgal-a giahphualah a ciahkik hi
Hih kumpi ngate tai-in Makkedah leihawm sungah bu uh hi
Tua ciangin Joshua kiangah, “Kumpi ngate Makkedah leihawm sungah a bu kimu khin hi,” ci-in kigen hi
Tua ciangin Joshua in, “Suangtum lianpite a leihawm gong liknelh un la, a cing dingin a gei-ah mi koih un

Ahih hangin note tua lai-ah om kei un. Na galte uh delhin a nungdalte bawh un la, a khuapi sung uhah amaute lutsak kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un note' khutsungah amaute hong piazo hi,” a ci hi
Joshua leh Israel mite in amaute a beisiang dongin tampi tak a thah khit uh ciang, leh a suakta lai mite amau' khuapi muan'huai sungah a tum khit uh ciangin
Makkedah giahphual Joshua kiangah mi khempeuh cidamin a ciahkik uh hi. Israel mite khatpeuh a paupih ngam kuamah omlo hi
Tua ciangin Joshua in, “Leihawm gong hong un la, leihawm panin tua kumpi ngate kei kiangah hong paikhiatpih un,” a ci hi
Amaute in tua bangmahin hih uh a, leihawm panin tua kumpi ngate, Jerusalem kumpi, Hebron kumpi, Jarmuth kumpi, Lakhish kumpi, leh Eglon kumpite, ama kiangah a paipih uh hi

Amaute in Joshua kiangah tua kumpi ngate a paikhiatpih uh ciangin, Joshua in Israel mi khempeuh samin, amah tawh a kuankhawm galkapmangte kiangah, “A nai-ah hong pai un la, hih kumpite' ngawngah na khe uh nga un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute a nai-ah hong pai-in, a khe uh amaute' ngawng tungah a nga uh hi
Joshua in amaute kiangah, “Lau kei un la, lungkia kei un. Thakhauh un la, hang un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note' do na gal khempeuhte uh tungah Topa in hih bangin bawl ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua khit ciangin Joshua in amaute satin sisak a, singkung nga tungah amaute a khai hi. Amaute in nitak dong sing tungah a khai uh hi

Ahih hangin ni a tum hun ciangin Joshua in thu pia a, amaute in sing tung panin lakhia sukin, amaute a buknasa leihawm sungah lawnsuk uh a, suangtum lianpite leihawm gongah a koih uh hi. Tudongin tua suangtumte omlai hi

Tua ni-in Joshua in Makkedah khua la a, namsau tawh tua khua leh a kumpipa vatgawp hi. A sunga om mi khempeuh susia mangin, bangmah sitlo a, Jerikho kumpipa tungah a bawl bangin Makkedah kumpipa tungah a bawl hi
Tua ciangin Joshua, amah tawh a om Israel-te khempeuh tawh Makkedah panin Libnah-ah paisuak uh a, Libnah khua a sim uh hi

Topa in tua khua leh a kumpipa zong Israel mite' khutsungah a pia hi. Amah in namsau tawh tua khua leh a sunga om mi khempeuh a vatgawp hi. Tua khua sungah bangmah sitlo a, Jerikho kumpipa tungah a bawl bangin a kumpipa tungah a bawl hi
Tua ciangin Joshua, amah tawh a om Israel-te khempeuh tawh Libnah panin Lakhish-ah paisuak uh a, tua khua umcihin a sim uh hi
Topa in Israel mite' khutsungah Lakhish pia a, amah in a ni nih ni-in la-in, Libnah a bawl bangin tua khua leh a sunga om mi khempeuh namsau tawh a vatgawp hi
Tua ciangin Lakhish a huh dingin Gezer kumpipa Horam hong kuanto hi. Ahi zongin khat zong a om nawnlo dongin Joshua in amah leh a mite a vatgawp hi
Tua ciangin Lakhish panin Eglon-ah, amah tawh a om Israel-te khempeuh tawh Joshua paisuakin tua khua umcihin a sim uh hi
Tua ni mahin tua khua la uh a, namsau tawh a vatgawp uh hi. Lakhish a hih mah bangin tua khua sunga om mi khempeuh tua ni-in amah in a susiamang hi
Tua ciangin Joshua, Israel-te khempeuh tawh Eglon panin Hebron-ah a paito hi. Amaute in tua khua simin
la-in, namsau tawh tua khua leh a kumpi leh a kiima om khempeuh a vatgawp hi. Eglon tungah a bawl bangin amah in kuamah sitlo a, tua khua leh a sunga om khempeuh a susiamang hi
Tua ciangin Joshua, Israel-te khempeuh tawh Debir lamah kihei kikin tua khua a sim hi

Amah in a kumpipa leh a kimnai-a khuapite khempeuh tawh tua Debir khua a la hi. Amaute in namsau tawh vatgawp uh a, a sunga om mi khempeuh a susiamang uh hi. Amah in kuamah sitlo a, Hebron leh Libnah leh a kumpipa tungah a bawlsa bangin Debir leh a kumpipa tungah a bawl hi

Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in gam khempeuh, mualtung gam leh Negeb gam leh lei niamna mun leh mualpang suk, leh a khuapite khempeuh a zo hi. Amah in kuamah sitlo a, Israel-te' Topa Pasian' thupiaksa bangin mi khempeuh a susiamang hi
Joshua in amaute Kadeshbarnea panin Gaza ciangdong, leh Goshen gam khempeuh Gibeon ciangdong a zogawp hi
Israel-te' Topa Pasian in Israel-te-a' dingin dosak ahih manin Joshua in hih kumpite khempeuh leh amau' leitang hun khat sungin a la khin hi
Tua ciangin amah tawh a om Israel khempeuh tawh Gilgal-a a giahphualah Joshua a ciahkik hi.
